ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "hand_dominance" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player */,
  "shooting_hand" TEXT /* Hand the player typically shoots with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current head coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff, Exhibition) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* The plus-minus rating of the player during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff, Exhibition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gamestats_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary entry */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in this type */,
  "avg_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "avg_assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists made per game */,
  "avg_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds collected per game */,
  "avg_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Average field goal percentage */,
  "avg_three_point_percentage" REAL /* Average three-point percentage */,
  "avg_free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Average free throw percentage */,
  "avg_personal_fouls" REAL /* Average personal fouls per game */,
  "avg_technical_fouls" REAL /* Average technical fouls per game */,
  "avg_plus_minus" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gamestats_summary_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_averages" (
  "average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the average entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "avg_points" REAL /* Average points scored by the player */,
  "avg_assists" REAL /* Average assists made by the player */,
  "avg_rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "avg_field_goals_made" REAL /* Average field goals made per game */,
  "avg_field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Average field goals attempted per game */,
  "avg_three_pointers_made" REAL /* Average three-pointers made per game */,
  "avg_three_pointers_attempted" REAL /* Average three-pointers attempted per game */,
  "avg_free_throws_made" REAL /* Average free throws made per game */,
  "avg_free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Average free throws attempted per game */,
  "avg_personal_fouls" REAL /* Average personal fouls per game */,
  "avg_technical_fouls" REAL /* Average technical fouls per game */,
  "avg_plus_minus" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_averages_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player affected by the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the injury */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., Recovering, Out, Questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
